name: Emovils — Reporte Diario 7:15 AM (CPA Watch)
description: Cada mañana a las 7:15 AM calcula el CPA, evalúa el estado del piloto y envía reporte al dueño por WhatsApp

parameters.code:
# Calcular CPA acumulado del piloto
meta_data = $('Obtener Gasto Meta Ads').item.json
metricas = $('Obtener Totales Airtable').all()

total_spent = float(meta_data.get('data', [{}])[0].get('spend', 0))
total_clients = sum(int(r['fields'].get('Reservas_Pagadas', 0)) for r in metricas if r.get('fields'))
total_revenue = sum(float(r['fields'].get('Ingresos_USD', 0)) for r in metricas if r.get('fields'))

cpa = round(total_spent / total_clients, 2) if total_clients > 0 else None

# Evaluar estado CPA
if cpa is None:
    status = 'SIN_DATOS'
    emoji = '⏳'
elif cpa < 6:
    status = 'SALUDABLE'
    emoji = '✅'
elif cpa <= 8:
    status = 'ALERTA_AMARILLA'
    emoji = '⚠️'
else:
    status = 'ALERTA_ROJA'
    emoji = '🔴'

return [{
    'total_spent': total_spent,
    'total_clients': total_clients,
    'total_revenue': total_revenue,
    'cpa': cpa,
    'cpa_status': status,
    'cpa_emoji': emoji,
    'should_pause': cpa is not None and cpa > 8,
    'budget_remaining': 100 - total_spent
}]
